llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: First explain what an inactive journey means in Adobe Journey Optimizer context (a journey that was previously live/published but has been stopped or closed, meaning it no longer accepts new profile entries but may still be processing profiles already inside it). Then present the list of inactive journeys returned from pass_1, showing their names, IDs, and any relevant metadata such as last updated time or description.

passes.expected_result: List of inactive journeys with their names, IDs, and statuses
passes.subtask: Fetch inactive journeys from Journey Optimizer API
